name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses using Shopify, processing 5–15 purchase orders/week tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses using Shopify processing 5–15 purchase orders/week, overdue approvals cause delayed shipments. We provide automated tracking and escalation alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses using Shopify, processing 5–15 purchase orders/week
problem_solved: Overdue purchase order approvals leading to delayed shipments.
features: weekly email alerts for overdue approvals
